inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakaan mehsoos kar rahi hoon, kaafi dinon se bukhar hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Generic viral presentation, fever and fatigue

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Could be early signs of bronchitis, but not enough to confirm

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Not enough symptoms to suggest Tuberculosis at this stage

inputs.text: Ab mujhe sookhi khaansi bhi ho rahi hai, bukhar bhi hai, par thoda kam ho gaya hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever is still present, could be a lingering viral infection

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Still not enough symptoms to strongly suggest Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Mujhe raat ko pasina aata hai, khaansi 2 hafte se zyada hai aur wazan bhi kam ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Night sweats, weight loss, and prolonged cough are cardinal signs of Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Bronchitis could cause cough, but night sweats and weight loss are not typical

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Pneumonia could cause some similar symptoms, but the combination of night sweats, weight loss, and prolonged cough points more towards Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Mujhe ab bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur kabhi-kabhi khaansi mein thoda khoon bhi aata hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Severe weakness and hemoptysis confirm the diagnosis of Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the presence of night sweats, weight loss, and hemoptysis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to the combination of symptoms and the progression of the disease
